metadata.review_only_rule: alternate residue-position sourcing requests are non-countable until explicit evidence is supplied, reviewed, and accepted by the label factory

rows.sourcing_policy: explicit alternate-structure residue positions are sourcing requests only; they do not count as local mechanistic evidence until reviewed and passed through the label factory
